storage_tiers.detail: Actual-lane checkpoints remain durable authority for resume, backup, and closeout.
Launch, evidence, and replay manifests remain durable retained artifacts.
Logs remain transient and are retained only as long as the later evidence contract allows.

credential_sources.purpose: select the admitted cloud project for remote artifact storage
credential_sources.retained_redaction: record only the env-var name and resolved project digest

credential_sources.purpose: select the admitted remote artifact and checkpoint bucket root
credential_sources.retained_redaction: record only the env-var name and selected bucket digest

credential_sources.purpose: authenticate retained storage uploads without embedding raw credentials in manifests
credential_sources.retained_redaction: record only the env-var name and credential-file digest

summary: The canonical actual-pretraining topology and storage bundle admits one homogeneous four-node H100 tensor-parallel mesh plus env-declared durable storage roots and credential sources without embedding secrets.
